title: bidens coreopsidis var. reptans
intro: Bidens coreopsidis var. reptans, also known as Bidens reptans or creeping joe-pye weed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and ease digestive issues. The health benefits of Bidens coreopsidis var. reptans include its ability to act as an antibacterial agent, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Bidens coreopsidis var. reptans can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
